title: Sync Board Based on Time Stamp Value

posts.author: sheliker (S ottt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am sending data in through the API. Its a time stamp of when a QR code is scanned
I have another board called Scheduling that has security guards schedules .

Based on the time the QR Code was scanned, I want to pre fill the Guard column based on who was scheduled to work on that day and the time stamp of the QR code falls within their shift. How can This be accomplished?

Video Explanation Here. Thanks.

https://res.cloudinary.com/dqwzka5cv/video/upload/v1610138400/814media/videos/automate.mp4

posts.author: Estelle (ML)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have developed an app to track item with status QR codes.
Would that suit your need if we add a feature that generates time tracking QR codes for each checkpoint and logs QR code scans in a board in a similar way as it is log in this example?

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
